message:
fix(codec): replace copy_nonoverlapping with copy in stream_decode (UB fix)

The Pdu::stream_decode() function shifts remaining bytes leftward in the
buffer after consuming a decoded PDU. When consumed < remain, the source
and destination memory regions overlap, making copy_nonoverlapping (memcpy)
undefined behavior. Replace with copy (memmove) which handles overlapping
regions correctly.

This fixes the pre-existing test abort in
batch_render_changes_preserves_request_order_with_out_of_order_responses.

Verified: 56 mux_client tests + 129 vendored tests + 17,922 default lib
tests all pass.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
